subject: Initial code check-in RANSim Controller and RANSim GUI
commit_message:
Initial code check-in RANSim Controller and RANSim GUI

Issue-ID: INT-1485
Signed-off-by: Priyadharshini <priyadharshini.b96@wipro.com>
Change-Id: I99fe693065072ff5c9b188f2177488a4cd93237d

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Hi Priyadharshini,

thanks for the patch.
I can see that you have json, ymal and java file.
I suggest we put in place a verification job for the json and yml file so you will get a verified job;
I imagined it should be possible to add some java linter as well but it is not a top priority;
I will have a look at the README as well to see if it is enough to allow other people to use this simulator :)
Maybe we should start referencing it on the wiki (https://wiki.onap.org/pages/viewpage.action?pageId=81399210).
I create a page dedicated to simulators/emulators maybe you can write some words on your simulator

thanks again for this contribution

Patch Set 1:

(19 comments)

lots of trailing spaces (easy to view through gerrit)..I did not review all the java files :)

The README looks pretty clear
Maybe precise the use case that will use this simulator (official doc)

Patch Set 1:

Morgan according to https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/INFO.yaml+Guidelines INFO.yaml should be the first file placed in repo after it's creation - maybe you could create one before this is merged?

I'll now add INFO.yaml verify job and basic linters.

I rebase the patchset
as you can see thanks to Bartek, we do have a verify job now.
it means that the format of your yaml/yml and json file is verified before merge
here errors have been found
you can see these errors in the logs

you should fix these format errors and submit a new amended patch
once everything will be fixed, you will got a verify +1

Please note that we "just" verify yml and json, nothing dealing with Java but we could also add some processing based on sonar as we do for the components.
however as it is simulator/test we focus on config
